remaining_issues.summary: No foundation block with preliminary terms for if, conditionals, comparison operators
remaining_issues.reason: Lesson 1-8 was reviewed as PASS with strong bouncer analogy. Operator recheck confirmed the lesson performs well without a foundation block. Colon and indentation are explicitly taught via multiple channels (Va dialogue, syntax reminder, common mistakes, find-the-bug exercise). A foundation block would improve cross-lesson consistency but is not needed for learning.
remaining_issues.recommended_action: Add foundation block during a future editorial consistency pass

remaining_issues.summary: Mission asks for formatted multiplication table, significantly harder than practice subtasks. Formatting and multiplication not prepared in lesson body.
remaining_issues.reason: This is a real difficulty pacing issue — the mission demands skills the lesson body does not teach. However, fixing it properly requires examining mission difficulty expectations across multiple lessons, not an isolated content edit. A course flow review can address mission difficulty curves systematically.
remaining_issues.recommended_action: Include in course flow review: examine mission difficulty relative to practice across Part 1 and Part 2

remaining_issues.summary: Mission too simple for a recap lesson — only asks to create empty list and append one item. Full task manager with while loop cannot be implemented within lesson format constraints.
remaining_issues.reason: This is a structural issue about quest/recap lesson format constraints, not an isolated content problem. The mission checker imposes limitations. A proper fix requires evaluating recap mission architecture — whether quest lessons should have alternative formats or multi-part missions.
remaining_issues.recommended_action: Include in course flow review: evaluate recap mission structure and quest lesson format
